reviews.review_description: It's very nice, but I'd rather prefer a smaller boat, like in "VR Regata", where you can play without teleport and being completly immersed

reviews.review_title: it has potential to be amazing one  day
reviews.review_description: It's very cool even just standing on the boat with nothing but the blue ocean and blue sky. Nothing really to do, just enjoy the scenery. Wish they add a nigh sky, a changing variety of clouds and weather, seeing a storm in the distance and then being inside huge waves; more land on the horizon and small islands we can visit; and more tutorial on how to operate the sailboat.
After a really sh%t%y day at work i go to this every day ,i find it more calming than most of the meditation experience apps, really lovely i just want to keep on sailing x

A great game to relax and Sail. Its got some realism to it but since you have no goals beyond just sailing it never feels frustrating to learn how to move your boat, or mostly doesn't. Add in multiplayer and I think this is one of those titles that feels very worth while. I will say that yes its not overly exciting and you aren't really aiming to complete anything if it sounds like your kind of game it probably is.
Video - https://youtu.be/b98dVZ82IKs

I already been sailing this for a long time on the GO, and it had regular updates and improvements that increased the detail and sailing experience. The publishers demonstrated that they were listening to users and their suggestions. Now that we have BBB on the quest I look forward to regular virtual sailing, and enjoying this wonderful experience, a nice refreshing change from killing virtual zombies and noisy virtual worlds, a place where it's just You, the boat, and the sea !

I really enjoy the experience. The app is buggy sometimes and won’t respond to commands and you have to keep pressing or slow press the controllers to get them to do what you want. The scenery is great, and I would recommend it if you can tolerate some quirks. Having sailed quite a bit, for a VR game this is relaxing. I use it to chill and to just enjoy being out on the water; it can be so relaxing. To make this more realistic, I would make it possible to go out to YouTube and select the music you’d like to listen to as when you really sail; we always are playing some smooth jazz, or something people like when being out. Like I said, great app, I just hope they get the bugs out and let you do some things like add the music to accompany your mood while sailing.

reviews.review_title: Can't change your situation, but scenery
reviews.review_description: I took a fancy to this app not only because I thought it would be a cool VR experience, but how it provides a mental retreat and promotes a peaceful environment that can have a tremendous impact on your health as the environment you're in or placed in can make all the difference for behavior. For example, take silence; it is by far the best atmosphere because it's where our mind goes and what our mind creates to try to make sense out of what we are going through that makes us believe and behave in at that moment seem real. Yet, I only had this app for a day and already I love it as you have created a place that soothes my disturbed mind and I would recommend it to anyone who was suffering from a mental illness! I named my boat 'TEENIE TINY TITANIC' LOL! I even stood at the front of the boat like I saw Jack do in the movie Titanic, and yelled: "I'm King of the World!" Thanks for that option! I thought it was even cooler of all the options in the menu that you can have for gameplay like: go sailing, treasure hunt, and multiplayer mode. Although, I would love to see, maybe... gameplay where a wakeboard appears in the back of the boat that you can ride on while the boat drives. Or, maybe, what if... you could water ski or waterboard? Also, an option that allows you to just sit and enjoy the scenery would be nice. Other than that I look forward to seeing what else this app comes out within its updates, it's so worth it and pays for itself because you can't put a price on mental health.

Excellent game, I give 5 out of 5,,,,because it still under developement .... I might change my score later but for now it 5.
I enconter only one probleme,,,, I do not know if it is a bug or me doing something wrong,,,,, When sailling after a few minutes the sterring wheel change position getting verrey closed off my chess even trought my body... making difficult to steer,,,if you used the wheel....is it me or a bug if it me some one help me out solving this!  If it a bug,,,now you know!

It have an exccellent potential....I love the way it done while sailling,,,,the sun set,,sun rise,,,night sailling and day great ....

The island graphique (deffenition)  need improuvement  they are very low resolution... and docking could be more realictic,,,my sailboat pass aff way trough the dock.....

Would be great to add a few distant islands with a compass on the boat to practices navigation,,,, imaging sailling long distance to discover distant island ,,,  

I recomend it for all peoples who like this king off game and relax while you practice basic sailling skill....

I did the treasure hunt game!

I am looking forward to improvements. I noticed some 3D txforn problems toward the end. I took pics. How can I help?

Played this in the beta, and it’s a very casual, relaxing boat simulator and I enjoy being able to get out on the “water” before I get my real life boat out there! You can turn the wheels and adjust the sails, but as of right now that is it. It would be fun to have some racing capabilities or to use other boats.
When it will have some dynamic wind, waves ans light sailing, it will be perfect !
